testcase.name: test_root_endpoint
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_iteration100_admin_system.py:34: in test_root_endpoint data = response.json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_refund_stats_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration100_admin_system.py:96: in test_refund_stats_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Refund stats failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Refund stats failed: {"detail":"Admin access required"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_self_healing_status_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration100_admin_system.py:115: in test_self_healing_status_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Self-healing status failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Self-healing status failed: {"detail":"Admin access required"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_system_health_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration100_admin_system.py:133: in test_system_health_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"System health failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: System health failed: {"detail":"Admin access required"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_auth_me_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing user in response assert 'user' in {'createdAt': '2026-02-19T16:13:08.326442+00:00', 'credits': 999999999, 'email': 'demo@example.com', 'id': '42843f6e-7c90-4c2f-8797-524c985f2477', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration100_admin_system.py:243: in test_auth_me_endpoint assert "user" in data, "Missing user in response" E AssertionError: Missing user in response E assert 'user' in {'createdAt': '2026-02-19T16:13:08.326442+00:00', 'credits': 999999999, 'email': 'demo@example.com', 'id': '42843f6e-7c90-4c2f-8797-524c985f2477', ...}

testcase.name: test_activate_self_healing
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration100_admin_system.py:267: in test_activate_self_healing assert response.status_code == 200, f"Activate self-healing failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Activate self-healing failed: {"detail":"Admin access required"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
